needs.summary: Paginated, newest-first list of admin audit entries, each joining the acting admin's display identity and the target business name; entries with a state change carry a before/after pair, others carry a free-text note; system-level events (sign-in) have a null target business.
needs.filters/actions: Filter by adminId (exact), by actionType (enum: plan-change, credit-grant, test-flag, reset, login), and substring search on target business name; sort descending by timestamp; response must include total entry count and filtered/shown count (screen renders 'Showing X of Y entries'), matching the admin pagination convention {data, page, total}. Screen also groups/labels by month (header 'July 2026'), implying a time-window or month scope parameter.

needs.summary: Distinct list of admin users who have audit entries (or simply all admin users), used to populate the 'Filter by admin' dropdown with id and display name.
needs.filters/actions: None beyond distinct/enumeration; screen derives it today by deduplicating adminId/adminName over fixture rows (page.tsx lines 86-95).

needs.summary: Implicit invariant, not an endpoint of its own: the audit log store must be append-only (no admin-facing edit or delete), matching the screen's footnote and the conventions rule that every admin WRITE endpoint records to admin_audit_log with actor, action, target, timestamp, and detail/diff.
needs.filters/actions: No write surface exists on this screen; entries are produced as side effects of other admin write endpoints.
